title: Privacy Policy
meta_description: Read the Privacy Policy for Static Website Generator and learn how we collect, use and protect your information.
og_description: Learn how Static Website Generator handles your personal information and protects your privacy.
excerpt: Your privacy is important to us. This page explains how we collect, use and protect your information.
content:
# Privacy Policy

At Static Website Generator (SWG), we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information.

## Information We Collect

We may collect information that you voluntarily provide when contacting us, creating an account or using our services.

## How We Use Your Information

We use your information to provide our services, improve the platform, communicate with you and ensure the security of your account.

## Cookies

Our website may use cookies to improve your browsing experience and understand how our website is used.

## Data Security

We take appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, disclosure or misuse.

## Contact

If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us using the contact information provided on our website.
